title: croton scheffleri
intro: Croton scheffleri, also known as the Croton tree or Adam's rib, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Croton scheffleri include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and relieving respiratory issues like asthma. Herbal preparations of Croton scheffleri include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, often used to soothe and heal various health conditions.
